post.description: Activates a non-banned employer account.
Transitions employer account into banned state.
Returns cached employer detail read model by primary key.
Suspends an employer account when policy allows.
Accepts a pending application when capacity allows.
Lists applications for a posting; JWT employer_id must match posting owner.
Rejects an application; optional reason on the command body.
Submits a worker application to an open posting.
Withdraws a pending application for the posting.
Adds or updates a required skill row for the posting.
Transitions a cancellable posting to cancelled state.
Marks an open or filled posting as completed.
Creates a draft posting for an active employer and location.
Returns posting detail including skill tags and application counts.
Requires Bearer JWT with a positive employer_id claim; request body may be `{}` — employer scope is taken only from the token.
Returns postings currently open for applications.
Publishes a draft posting so workers can apply.
Removes a skill row from the posting by skill id.

put.description: Updates editable fields on a draft posting.

post.description: Returns counters such as total system users, pending approvals, and users activated today.
Re-enables a system user group for authorization evaluations.
Adds or updates permission effect row for a system user group.
Disables a system user group so it no longer contributes rules.
Bans the target account and revokes active refresh tokens.
Rotates password hash and salt for the target account.
Reactivates a previously banned system user account.
Creates a new admin system user and attaches to default admin group when present.
Creates employer system user, employer aggregate, and default active supervisor link.
Creates worker system user and linked worker profile row.
Authenticates credentials and returns JWT access token with refresh token.
Returns profile information for the currently authenticated user derived from JWT claims.
Validates refresh token for user + device and issues a fresh token pair.
Stores token hash and expiry for the user identified in the command body.
Suspends a non-banned system user account.
Activates account when token hash and expiry are valid for the user in the command body.
Adds a normalized skill tag to the worker profile.
Returns worker detail model including normalized skill tags.
